---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: "images/profile-pic-bw.png"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15rem
format:
  html: 
    page-layout: article
---



```{=html}

<!-- Include Tippy.js and Popper.js for interactive tooltips -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6/dist/tippy.css" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/@popperjs/core@2"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/tippy.js@6"></script>

<!-- Include Particles.js for a dynamic particle background -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/particles.js@2.0.0/particles.min.js"></script>

<!-- Extra CSS and HTML to show that you are both a webdeveloper and a superscientist -->
<style>
  /* Fullscreen Particle Background Container */
  #particles-js {
    position: fixed;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    z-index: -1;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
  }

  /* Animated Gradient Background Overlay */
  body {
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
    background: linear-gradient(270deg, #f6f9fc, #e9eff5, #f6f9fc, #e9eff5);
    background-size: 800% 800%;
    animation: gradientAnimation 20s ease infinite;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 20px;
    color: #333;
  }

  @keyframes gradientAnimation {
    0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
    100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
  }

  /* Professional Entrance for the Hero Section */
  #hero-heading {
    text-align: left;
    margin: 2rem 0;
    animation: fadeSlide 1.5s ease-out;
  }
  
  @keyframes fadeSlide {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  
  #hero-heading p {
    font-size: 1.3em;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }

  /* Stylish List with Subtle Bounce and Professional Icons */
  #hero-heading ul {
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
    margin: 1rem 0;
  }
  
  #hero-heading li {
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 1.5em;
    animation: bounceIn 0.8s ease;
  }
  
  #hero-heading li:before {
    content: '★';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: #4A90E2;
    font-size: 1.2em;
    animation: pulseStar 1.5s infinite;
  }
  
  @keyframes pulseStar {
    0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
    50% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
  }
  
  @keyframes bounceIn {
    0% { transform: translateY(-10px); opacity: 0; }
    60% { transform: translateY(5px); opacity: 1; }
    100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  
  /* Interactive Tooltip Terms */
  .tooltip-term {
    color: #007BFF;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-decoration: underline;
    transition: color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }
  
  .tooltip-term:hover {
    color: #ff4081;
    transform: scale(1.15) rotate(1deg);
  }
  
  /* Pimped-Up Profile Image with Gradient Border & Shadow */
  .jolla-about .profile-image {
    border: 5px solid;
    border-image-slice: 1;
    border-width: 5px;
    border-image-source: linear-gradient(45deg, #4A90E2, #50b3a2);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
  }
  
  .jolla-about .profile-image:hover {
    transform: scale(1.1);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  }
  
  /* Digital Clock Styling */
  #digital-clock {
    font-size: 1.2em;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #4A90E2;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
    position: absolute;
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
  }
  
  /* Link Styling */
  #hero-heading a {
    color: #4A90E2;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  
  #hero-heading a:hover {
    color: #ff4081;
  }
</style>



```




```{=html}
<!-- Particle Background Container -->
<div id="particles-js"></div>

<!-- Digital Clock Display -->
<div id="digital-clock"></div>


```




```{=html}
<div id="hero-heading">
  <p>
    <strong>Abdelkarim el Ghani</strong> is a dedicated Research Assistant at 
    <a href="https://www.eur.nl/" target="_blank">Erasmus University Rotterdam</a>.
    With expertise spanning both advanced web development and cutting-edge scientific research, he specializes in:
  </p>

  <ul>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="data-analysis">Statistical data analysis</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="neuroscience">Neuroscience</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="open-science">Open science practices</span>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <p>His work integrates sophisticated programming and state-of-the-art data visualization techniques, ensuring robust and reproducible research outcomes.</p>

  <ul>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="programming">Web development</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="data-visualization">Data visualization</span>
    </li>
    <li>
      <span class="tooltip-term" data-template="reproducible-research">Reproducible research</span>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <p>Hover over any term to learn more about his expertise.</p>
</div>

<!-- Hidden Tooltip Content -->
<div style="display: none;">
  <div id="data-analysis">
    Converting complex data into actionable insights using advanced statistical techniques.
  </div>
  <div id="neuroscience">
    Investigating the brain's complexities to better understand human behavior.
  </div>
  <div id="open-science">
    Promoting rigorous, transparent, and collaborative research practices.
  </div>
  <div id="programming">
    Developing robust, responsive websites and interactive applications with modern technologies.
  </div>
  <div id="data-visualization">
    Crafting clear, impactful visualizations that translate data into meaningful narratives.
  </div>
  <div id="reproducible-research">
    Ensuring every result is verifiable and reproducible through systematic workflows.
  </div>
</div>





```




```{=html}
<script>
  // Initialize Tippy.js for tooltip functionality
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const terms = document.querySelectorAll('.tooltip-term');
    terms.forEach((term, index) => {
      tippy(term, {
        content(reference) {
          const id = reference.getAttribute('data-template');
          const template = document.getElementById(id);
          return template ? template.innerHTML : '';
        },
        allowHTML: true,
        theme: 'light',
        animation: 'scale',
        arrow: true,
        delay: [index * 100, 100],
      });
    });
  });

  // Initialize Particles.js for a dynamic background
  particlesJS("particles-js", {
    "particles": {
      "number": {
        "value": 60,
        "density": {
          "enable": true,
          "value_area": 800
        }
      },
      "color": {
        "value": "#4A90E2"
      },
      "shape": {
        "type": "circle"
      },
      "opacity": {
        "value": 0.5,
        "random": false
      },
      "size": {
        "value": 3,
        "random": true
      },
      "line_linked": {
        "enable": true,
        "distance": 150,
        "color": "#4A90E2",
        "opacity": 0.4,
        "width": 1
      },
      "move": {
        "enable": true,
        "speed": 3,
        "direction": "none",
        "random": false,
        "straight": false,
        "out_mode": "out"
      }
    },
    "interactivity": {
      "detect_on": "canvas",
      "events": {
        "onhover": {
          "enable": true,
          "mode": "grab"
        },
        "onclick": {
          "enable": true,
          "mode": "push"
        },
        "resize": true
      }
    },
    "retina_detect": true
  });

  // Digital Clock Functionality
  function updateClock() {
    const clockEl = document.getElementById('digital-clock');
    const now = new Date();
    const timeStr = now.toLocaleTimeString();
    clockEl.textContent = timeStr;
  }
  setInterval(updateClock, 1000);
  updateClock();
</script>


```
